title: Multi-Chat Platforms integration to monday.com
excerpt:
Hi there! 
We’re an international company managing leads and sales with clients all over the world. We’re spread thinly across at least 10 different communication platforms and it’s starting to be difficult to stay focus…

posts.author: DanaWD (Dana Wizman Danan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!
We’re an international company managing leads and sales with clients all over the world. We’re spread thinly across at least 10 different communication platforms and it’s starting to be difficult to stay focused with all these channels, making sure we’re not missing opportunities and keeping response time short as possible.

We’re looking for the right technology/ app integration / Company that can integrate our conversations into monday.com’s update box per lead.

For example, we currently using:

  • WeChat
  • Red
  • iMessage
  • Whatsapp business
  • Whatsapp normal
  • Line
  • Kakao Talk

Thanks in advance!

Dana

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Dana!

Sounds like you need a central hub to bring all your lead communication into Monday.com’s update box without missing a single message.

We’ll leverage API integrations and automation tools (like Make.com or Zapier) to sync your messages from WeChat, Red, iMessage, WhatsApp (both versions), Line, and KakaoTalk into monday.com. This setup will ensure:

Real-time message forwarding to monday.com per lead
Auto-tagging & filtering to categorize messages by source and priority
Response tracking to keep follow-ups organized and fast

Let’s Schedule

posts.author: DanaWD (Dana Wizman Danan)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Sachin, I’ve penciled in a meeting.

posts.author: DanaWD (Dana Wizman Danan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Sachin, I am in the meeting link, waiting for you.

Thanks

Dana
